name: Start Managing Your Business Finances
description:
Hosted by Partner Community Capital, Part One of the Small Business & Entrepreneur’s Financial Success Series covers basic business finances. 
Join us in this virtual workshop to learn about the basics of business finance, including essential accounting concepts, the chart of accounts, and a comparison of the pros and cons of popular software options. 
This workshop is designed for start-ups, new business owners, and anyone who wants to take control of their business finances. The workshop will provide a solid overview of business finances. Sound financial practices are key to getting your business ready for funding.

name: West Virginia Entrepreneurship Ecosystem Monthly Meeting
description: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” css_params=””]Join the West Virginia Entrepreneurship Ecosystem for our monthly virtual meeting, where partners from across the state come together to share updates, highlight resources, and collaborate on ways to support entrepreneurs. This session includes brief presentations, open discussion, and opportunities to connect with others working to strengthen West Virginia’s entrepreneurial landscape. All are welcome![/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

name: WV Outdoor Economy Summit
description:
Hosted by The Nature Conservancy and the WVU Brad & Alys Smith Outdoor Economic Development Collaborative, and proudly presented by the Charleston Convention & Visitors Bureau, the West Virginia Outdoor Economy Summit is the state’s first cross-sector gathering focused on growing our $2.1 billion outdoor economy. 
Join leaders from tourism, conservation, recreation, entrepreneurship, and community development on February 17–18, 2026, at the Charleston Coliseum & Convention Center, to share ideas and shape West Virginia’s outdoor future. The momentum continues on February 19 at the State Capitol, where we’ll showcase the strength and potential of West Virginia’s outdoor economy to lawmakers.

location.name: Charleston Coliseum & Convention Center, 200 Civic Center Dr,, Charleston, WV, 25301

name: WVU Zinnstarter Pitch Competition
description: A pitch competition where WVU undergrads compete for over $20,000 in prizes.
